scripts.start:app: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.start:services:node: concurrently -n import,filehub,notify -c green,magenta,blue "npm run import-service" "npm run file-hub" "npm run notification-service"
scripts.start:services:python: concurrently -n ai,pdf -c red,white "npm run ai-service" "npm run pdf-extractor"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n app,node,python -c cyan,green,red "npm run start:app" "npm run start:services:node" "npm run start:services:python"
